productDisplayName: Fila Men's Fitness Hiker Brown Shoe
description: Make all your hiking and training activities more enjoyable with the fitness Hiker high tops from fila. Team them with jeans and tees for a cool casual look.Upper Synthetic and fabric uppers with perforations on the synthetic toe box for greater breathability and protection Lace-ups and velcro ankle strap for snug Fit Cushioned collar and tongue for greater comfort Brand name on the tongue, strap and on the back of collar for style Midsole Full-length EVA midsole for lightweight comfort Lightly cushioned footbed for all-day comfort Outsole Abrasion resistant outsole in herringbone pattern for greater traction Pivot point on big toe mound for easy 180 degree movement Wash careRub surface with clean, damp cloth to remove dirtDo not machine wash
